module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for session runtime orchestration, model backend abstractions, and task execution drafts. lib.rs is re-export wiring; the session child module owns Session and SessionContext, while model and task child modules own backend, step, task, and execution interfaces.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the Deepseek backend placeholder implementation.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup and SessionContext task/event routing runtime data behind the agent session namespace.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns interface-only task and step types split into step.rs and task.rs; mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.
